meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.3 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] Happy-path 縦中横: the target ３３ precedes the directive (明治３３年…), so it is recognised and the directive consumed with no diagnostic. The target is non-adjacent (年 intervenes before the bracket), so the forward node stays Referenced (ADR 0003 §6.2): HTML renders ３３ once in the surrounding run and drops the combine-upright styling — re-rendering the target would double ３３ (the duplication bug fixed in reference impl #228). serialize re-emits the bracket form unchanged with the literal left upstream. Complements the recovery case (vector tate_chu_yoko) where the target is absent and tcy-target-not-found is raised.
